title: M15 GASS 2 - S22 Engine storage and Preservation - Level 2
description: Quiz for M15 GASS 2 chapter S22 Engine storage and Preservation level 2

questions.text: **342. Hva må en gjøre med motoren dersom den skal lagres i ca en mnd og motoren er montert på flyet?**
explanations:
*
*  on engine & pitot, inlets/outlets, NACA inlets

~30 days operation test (eller må  lagres iht AMM)
* check & fill (preservation) oil
* operate engine 20 mins

~30-365 må lagre fuel og olje separat
* remove fuel & supply preservation oil at 50 psi
* do a dry motoring check 30 sec & wet 5 sec
*  VBV flaps closed
* silica gel bags in inlet and outlet
* cover w/ foil for transpo
upto 1yr

at engine cover
* blue = humid below 30%
* darker = hmid over 30%

questions.text: **343. Hva skal en gjøre med motoren dersom den skal langtids lagres (flere mnd)?**
explanations:
*
*  on engine & pitot, inlets/outlets, NACA inlets

~30 days operation test (eller må  lagres iht AMM)
* check & fill (preservation) oil
* operate engine 20 mins

~30-365 må lagre fuel og olje separat
* remove fuel & supply preservation oil at 50 psi
* do a dry motoring check 30 sec & wet 5 sec
*  VBV flaps closed
* silica gel bags in inlet and outlet
* cover w/ foil for transpo
upto 1yr

at engine cover
* blue = humid below 30%
* darker = hmid over 30%
